acceptance_conditions.label: contract, protocol, R156 evidence, input, target, and sources remain exact
98 post-preregistration process artifacts retain 160 direct replays
all replays use the frozen input, target descriptor, pass, software, and environment
all five profiles complete without replacement
all process and replay identity fields are retained
within-profile and cross-profile mapping distributions are complete
new mappings and no-solution rows remain classified
all four preregistered contrasts are emitted
both R156 mappings remain independently and exactly tied
selection, routes, sampling, blinded confirmation, mechanism, bug, hardware, advantage, BQP, solved-frontier, and credit claims remain false

claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: a lower-level mechanism or confirmed Qiskit bug, general compiler determinism, hidden statistical evidence, simulation or hardware performance, transfer, route advantage, quantum advantage, BQP separation, solved B4/B8/B10, or new credit
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: one preregistered direct-pass profile matrix over the two exactly tied public R156 mappings

contrast_matrix.interpretation_boundary: profile association only; a distribution difference does not identify a lower-level Rust, process, hash, or iteration mechanism

requirements.label: contract, protocol, R156 evidence, input, target, and source hashes are bound
all 160 replay rows retain frozen fields
all five profile process counts match the contract
mapping distributions and four contrasts are complete
new mappings and no-solution outcomes remain admissible
the exact tied score is independently reproduced
no simulation, shots, or sampling are performed
no mechanism, bug, hardware, advantage, BQP, solved-frontier, or credit claim

summary.diagnostic_interpretation: At least one frozen profile retains more than one mapping class; the direct-pass boundary remains profile-variable and requires a smaller enumeration-order reproducer before any mechanism attribution.
summary.implementation_smoke_disclosure: Five unretained implementation-smoke direct-pass invocations occurred after public preregistration and before the retained matrix while validating Qiskit property-set extraction and Target reconstruction. They exposed four endpoint_4_to_0 outcomes and one endpoint_4_to_2 outcome; the latter came from the descending-order Target. They are excluded from the 160-row matrix, no condition or analysis was changed, and R157 is not claimed as blinded confirmation.
